title: Incorporation by reference  - Canada.ca
content:
## Documents incorporated by reference for the regulatory operations and enforcement branch (ROEB)
- List of Non-prescription Drugs for Which the Testing Requirements Set Out in Subsections C.02.019(1) and (2) of the Food and Drug Regulations Do Not Apply
- List of Foreign Countries and Their Regulatory Authorities for the Application of Subsection C.02.019(5) of the Food and Drug Regulations
These documents are listed in Health Canada’s Incorporation by Reference Inventory and are available by contacting the Health Canada Health Products Inspection and Licensing office: hc.drug.gmp.questions-bpf.medicaments.sc@canada.ca . Archived documents are also listed in the Inventory. For more information consult Health Canada’s Incorporation by Reference Policy .
